description: Style Note Look adorable in this pair of classic sandals from carlton london. The false tiger skin patch on the toe region and fabric straps offer a contemporary glamourous look. Slip into them with a flowy dress and a shoulder bag, and enjoy those shopping sprees in the winter sun in comfort and style. Product Details Beige slip-ons with overlays, stitched detailing, false tiger skin patch and tie up detail on the forefoot Soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole Textured rubber outsole with a raised heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
